title: Drizzled Buttery Jamaican Grape Leaves Bowl
description: A high-protein, low-glycemic post-workout bowl featuring shredded jerk chicken and buttery grape leaves served in a sizzling stone dolsot.

ingredients.name: Grape leaves
ingredients.notes: preserved, rinsed, and julienned for a shaggy texture

instructions: Preheat a stone dolsot bowl over medium-high heat on the stovetop for five minutes.
Coat the inside of the hot stone bowl thoroughly with coconut oil.
Spread the cauliflower rice across the bottom of the bowl to create a crispy layer.
Layer the shredded jerk chicken and julienned grape leaves over the rice.
Sprinkle the minced scotch bonnet, allspice, and fresh thyme leaves over the top.
Allow the bowl to sizzle undisturbed for three minutes to develop a crust.
Drizzle the melted grass-fed butter evenly over the entire dish.
Toss the ingredients lightly with a spoon to incorporate the buttery drizzle before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
